summary.zh-CN: Remote 断线现在可追踪，短暂的连接器离线也会自动重试。
summary.en-US: Remote disconnects are now traceable, and temporary connector outages retry automatically.

body.zh-CN: Remote 状态会显示连接标识、心跳、断线、重连和最近一次恢复结果，连接恢复后异常证据仍可查询。
body.en-US: Remote status reports connection identity, heartbeat, disconnect, reconnect, and recovery data while retaining incident evidence after recovery.

title.zh-CN: 本机与 Relay 日志可以关联

body.zh-CN: 同一个连接标识会贯穿本机与云端事件，并记录关闭码、持续时间和心跳结果。
body.en-US: A shared connection identifier links local and cloud events with close codes, connection duration, and heartbeat results.

body.zh-CN: 连接器短暂离线时，域名页面会显示事件标识并自动重试；会话失效仍会明确要求重新登录。
body.en-US: Temporary connector outages show an incident identifier and retry automatically, while invalid sessions still require sign-in.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级，Remote 实例和两个域名都会保持不变。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update through the stable channel while Remote instances and both domains remain unchanged.
